title: sphaeralcea fendleri var. albescens
intro: Sphaeralcea fendleri var. albescens, also known as white gilia or white globemallow, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family and is native to the southwestern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits in soothing and calming the body. Herbal preparations of white gilia, including teas, infusions, and salves, have been used in folk medicine to promote wound healing, reduce pain, and support respiratory health.
